grace_period.source_quote: Grace period (renewal + instalments) • For instalment premium: ▪ 15 days grace for monthly instalments ▪ 30 days grace for quarterly/half-yearly/annual instalments ▪ Coverage continues during the grace

free_look_period.source_quote: Free look period • 30 days from date of receipt of policy to review the terms and conditions of the Policy, and to return the same if not acceptable (only at inception, not renewals/porting).

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: 3.1.3. 30-day waiting period • Expenses for treatment of any illness within 30 days from first policy commencement excluded, except accidents. • Not applicable if insured has continuous coverage >12 months.

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (Acko covers all day-care procedures up to SI; 500+ procedures)

network_hospital_count.source_note: ACKO has 11,500+ cashless hospitals across India (insurer's cashless landing page, scraped 2026-05-15)
network_hospital_count.source_quote: Insurer-level metric backfilled from public-web source — see source_url

ayush_coverage.source_quote: If any insured under this policy undergoes Day Care Treatment (including AYUSH treatment) in a Hospital/Nursing Home/Day Care Centre, we cover the expenses.

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Maternity Excluded: • childbirth (incl. complicated delivery/C-section) and pre/post hospitalization • miscarriage (unless due to accident) • lawful medical termination

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Organ Donor Expenses- Part of base SI If anyone insured requires organ transplant, we cover the organ donor's in-patient hospitalization expenses for harvesting the organ within the inpatient Sum insured of the insured. domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: Domiciliary Treatment (Domiciliary Hospitalization)- Part of base SI We cover costs of such domiciliary hospitalization if anyone insured takes treatment at home (instead of a hospital) due to: Inability to be moved, OR Non-availability of hospital beds. Conditions: Must continue

worldwide_emergency_cover.source_quote: if Worldwide In-Patient Hospitalization cover is available in your policy schedule, this exclusion shall be waived off. preventive_health_checkup.source_quote: Preventive Health Check-up - Additional benefit and not part of base SI For insured persons aged above 18, we facilitate and provide tests as per Schedule: CBC, ESR, HbA1C Serum Creatinine, Cholesterol, HDL, Triglycerides Routine Urine Analysis SGOT, SGPT, GGT Uric Acid How it's

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: You can submit claims as Cashless (network provider) or Reimbursement (you pay first, we reimburse if the claim is admissible).

geographic_coverage.source_quote: Worldwide In-Patient Hospitalization- Part of base SI If opted, this benefit extends your in-patient hospitalization cover outside India.

modern_treatments_covered.source_quote: Modern Treatment- Part of base SI If anyone insured undergoes in-patient or day care treatment for the following procedures, we indemnify medical expenses related to the procedures: Uterine Artery Embolization and HIFU Balloon Sinuplasty Deep Brain Stimulation Oral chemotherapy I
